title: polyphlebium vieillardii
intro: Polyphlebium vieillardii, also known as Vieillard's polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is primarily known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an astringent and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Polyphlebium vieillardii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
